This directory contains code derived from:

- `dwzhu-pku/PaperBanana` — https://github.com/dwzhu-pku/PaperBanana
- License: Apache-2.0

Modifications for this repository:

- trimmed to the academic illustration runtime needed by ARIS
- removed demo UI, benchmark assets, notebooks, and unrelated pipeline code
- replaced upstream client dependencies with a small stdlib-based HTTP runtime
- adapted prompts, config, manifest writing, and Workflow 3 integration
- added graceful no-retrieval and no-backend-config fallbacks for local skill use

Original upstream copyright notices are preserved in derived source files.
